debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝ : Category α
c X Y Z : α
f : Hom X Y
g : Hom Y Z
⊢ (fun g_1 => comp (comp f g) g_1) = comp (fun g_1 => comp g g_1) fun g => comp f g

failed_attempts:
have h1 : (fun (h : Hom Z c) => ((f ≫ g) ≫ h : Hom X c)) = (fun (h : Hom Z c) => (f ≫ (g ≫ h : Hom Y c) : Hom X c)) := by
      funext h
      simp [Hom.ext_iff, Category.comp_assoc]
      <;>
      simp_all [Function.funext_iff]
      <;>
      aesop
    simp_all [Function.funext_iff]
    <;>
    aesop

have h : ∀ (h : Hom Z c), ((f ≫ g) ≫ h : Hom Z c) = f ≫ (g ≫ h) := by
      intro h
      simp [comp_assoc]
      <;> rfl
    
    funext h
    have h₁ := h h
    simp_all [comp_assoc]
    <;> aesop

funext x
    simp [Hom, Function.comp]
    <;> simp_all [Associative]
    <;> try aesop
    <;> try simp_all [Hom]
    <;> try simp_all [Function.comp]

funext h
    have h₁ : (g ≫ f) ≫ h = g ≫ (f ≫ h) := by
      apply Hom.assoc
    simp [h₁]
    <;> simp_all [Hom.assoc]
    <;> aesop

funext h
    simp_all [Function.comp_apply, Hom.ext_iff]
    <;> simp_all [have_eq]
    <;> aesop

ext (x : Hom Z c)
    simp [comp, Function.comp]
    <;> simp_all [cat_assoc]
    <;> aesop

funext h
    simp only [Function.comp_apply]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Composition]) <;>
    (try aesop) <;>
    (try simp_all [Composition]) <;>
    (try aesop)
